Manual QA is not required for this sprint because it adds deterministic data/logic behavior and does not add UI, animation, or new visual assets.

## Automated Acceptance Criteria

### 2-1: Rough Terrain Cost Model

- [x] `R` parses as `Map.TileState.ROUGH`.
- [x] `Map.is_walkable()` returns true for `ROUGH`.
- [x] `Map.get_movement_cost()` returns 1 for `WALKABLE`, 2 for `ROUGH`, and a negative invalid cost for blocked/obstacle/out-of-bounds.
- [x] `place_unit()` and `move_unit()` still reject blocked/obstacle/out-of-bounds tiles.

### 2-2: Weighted Movement Resolver

- [x] All-walkable maps preserve existing reachable counts.
- [x] A rough tile can be reached only when the unit has enough movement budget.
- [x] A tile beyond rough terrain is excluded when total cost exceeds `unit.mov`.
- [x] Path reconstruction follows the lower-cost path when rough terrain makes the direct path more expensive.

### 2-3: Rough Pass Map Variant

- [x] `rough_pass.csv` is listed in `map_variants.json`.
- [x] The map dimensions match the manifest.
- [x] Spawns are unique, in bounds, and on normal walkable tiles.
- [x] The map contains at least one rough tile and remains connected from Player spawns to Enemy spawns.

### 2-4: BasicAI Terrain Awareness

- [x] BasicAI does not import terrain-specific code.
- [x] BasicAI chooses a cost-aware move-and-attack tile through `MovementResolver`.
- [x] Existing BasicAI direct attack, move-toward, wait, and immutability tests remain green.

### 2-5: Runtime Smoke

Required commands:

```powershell
& 'G:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Godot Engine\godot.windows.opt.tools.64.exe' --headless --path . --script res://tests/test_runner.gd
& 'G:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Godot Engine\godot.windows.opt.tools.64.exe' --headless --path . --scene res://src/Game.tscn --quit-after 2
& 'G:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Godot Engine\godot.windows.opt.tools.64.exe' --headless --path . --scene res://src/Game.tscn --quit-after 2 -- --map=rough_pass
& 'G:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Godot Engine\godot.windows.opt.tools.64.exe' --headless --path . --scene res://src/Game.tscn --quit-after 2 -- --map=rough_pass --enemy-ai=basic
```

Expected:

```text

SCRIPT ERROR: 0

ERROR lines: 0
```
